title: nasturtium rotundum
intro: Nasturtium rotundum, also known as Indian cress, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. The leaves and flowers of this plant possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are often used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of nasturtium rotundum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and act as an antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of this plant include making teas, infusions, and poultices from its leaves, flowers, and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
